Repo: ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering Description: Awesome list for AI agent harness engineering: tools, patterns, evals, memory, MCP, permissions, observability, and orchestration. Topics: agent-harness, agent-memory, agent-orchestration, ai-agents, awesome-list, context-engineering, harness-engineering, mcp Stars: 767 README:

Awesome Harness Engineering

Curated resources, patterns, and templates for building reliable AI agent harnesses.

Deutsch | English | Espa脙卤ol | Fran脙搂ais | 忙聴楼忙聹卢猫陋聻 | 铆聲聹锚碌颅矛聳麓 | Portugu脙陋s | 脨聽脩聝脩聛脩聛脨潞脨赂脨鹿 | 盲赂颅忙聳聡

**Harness engineering** is the discipline of designing the scaffolding 芒聙聰 context delivery, tool interfaces, planning artifacts, verification loops, memory systems, and sandboxes 芒聙聰 that surrounds an AI agent and determines whether it succeeds or fails on real tasks. This list focuses on the *harness*, not the model. Every component here exists because the model can't do it alone 芒聙聰 and the best harnesses are designed knowing those components will become unnecessary as models improve. --- ## Contents - [冒聼聯聬 Foundations](#foundations) - [冒聼搂漏 Design Primitives](#design-primitives) - [冒聼聰聞 Agent Loop](#agent-loop) - [冒聼聴潞茂赂聫 Planning & Task Decomposition](#planning--task-decomposition) - [冒聼聯娄 Context Delivery & Compaction](#context-delivery--compaction) - [冒聼聰搂 Tool Design](#tool-design) - [冒聼聰聦 Skills & MCP](#skills--mcp) - [冒聼聸隆茂赂聫 Permissions & Authorization](#permissions--authorization) - [冒聼搂聽 Memory & State](#memory--state) - [芒職聶茂赂聫 Task Runners & Orchestration](#task-runners--orchestratio
